node.text: Joanna's first passion was acting, but now she feels she shines in writing.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "book writers group") on Session 9 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Joanna recently joined a writers group that she finds inspirational and supportive.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "book writers group") on Session 9 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Joanna feels supported and motivated by having someone throughout the process.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "book writers group") on Session 5 (Score: 0.75)

node.text: Joanna is working on a script called 'Finding Home' with her writing group, which she finds rewarding and emotional.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "book writers group") on Session 9 (Score: 0.99)

node.text: Joanna has a lot of books that she uses for writing inspiration.
Joanna's advice for someone pursuing writing includes reading lots, trying different genres, building a solid understanding of literature, and not being afraid to write and share.
Joanna is currently consumed by her writing and is hoping for good news soon.
Joanna auditioned for a writing gig and had mixed emotions about it - excited but also anxious.
Joanna appreciates Nate's support for her writing projects.
Joanna finds it hard to switch off and experiences a tug-of-war between hope and doubt.
